codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature requirements. Created operator_feedback.rs with OperatorFeedbackParser, OperatorFeedbackService, and OperatorGuidancePattern. Properly integrates with pattern_learning via ConventionSource::FromOperatorFeedback. All 19 tests pass, workspace builds clean, clippy passes with no warnings.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ConventionSource::FromOperatorFeedback enum variant was already present in pattern_learning.rs before this feature was implemented (line 418). The feature properly reuses this existing variant rather than adding a new one, which is correct.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: pattern_learning.rs:418 - pub enum ConventionSource { FromAntiPattern, FromSuccessfulTask, FromOperatorFeedback }

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed proper Rust skill conventions: used async_trait where needed, proper error handling with Result/SwellError, used Arc<RwLock<>> for shared state, and followed the existing module structure pattern in swell-memory.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker read pattern_learning.rs, blocks.rs, procedural.rs, and lib.rs to understand existing patterns before implementing

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker discovered that ConventionSource::FromOperatorFeedback was already defined but unused in pattern_learning.rs and properly integrated with it. No new knowledge gaps identified.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: operator_feedback.rs imports ConventionSource from pattern_learning and uses it for the source field

summary: Feature implementation passes review. The operator feedback module correctly parses CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files with 0.95 base confidence (higher than agent-learned patterns at 0.4-0.7), implements mtime-based change detection for sync, and integrates properly with the existing pattern_learning conventions system. All verification steps pass.
